article.title: Hitron exec provides a vendor's-eye view of the FCC's router ban
article.summary: Hitron's Greg Fisher said the process to gain exemptions from the FCC's ban on foreign-made consumer routers was initially daunting but 'pretty simple' once applications were filed. The full process took about six weeks, he said.
article.title_zh: Hitron 高管提供對 FCC 路由器禁令的供應商視角
article.summary_zh: Hitron 的 Greg Fisher 表示，獲得 FCC 外製消費級路由器禁令豁免的流程起初令人望而生畏，但申請後「相當簡單」，整個過程耗時約六週。

article.title: Why South Korea’s AI Stock Mania Is a Warning
article.summary: South Korea’s stock market has surged about 200% year-on-year, powered by an AI-fueled chip rally. But extreme volatility and heavy reliance on two companies may mean it’s a bubble waiting to burst. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: 為什麼韓國 AI 股票熱潮是一個警告
article.summary_zh: 韓國股市同比飆升約 200%，由 AI 驅動的芯片漲幅推動，但極端波動性和對兩家公司的沉重依賴可能意味著這是一個泡沫即將破裂。

article.title: Synaptics Acquisition by Onsemi Affirms Edge AI Is for Real
article.summary: Hassane El-Khoury does it again, though his role in the interplay among power, sensing, computing, and connectivity has reversed this time around. In 2019, as the newly appointed CEO of Cypress
article.title_zh: Onsemi 收購 Synaptics 確認邊緣 AI 已成現實
article.summary_zh: Hassane El-Khoury 再次展現領導力，但這次他在電源、感測、運算和連接之間的角色已經反轉。

article.title: IBM chip-design 'breakthrough' weakens Huawei claims
article.summary: Both IBM and Huawei say three-dimensional designs could improve chip performance, but IBM may have gone one better.
article.title_zh: IBM 晶片設計「突破」削弱華為的主張
article.summary_zh: IBM 和華為都表示三維設計可以改善晶片性能，但 IBM 的表現可能更勝一籌。

article.title: Washington’s Foreign Ban on Anthropic’s Top Models May Backfire
article.summary: The move may act as a tailwind for rival China, boosting demand for the Asian nation’s open source AI.
article.title_zh: 華府對 Anthropic 頂級模型的禁令可能適得其反
article.summary_zh: 該舉措可能成為中國競爭對手的利好，提振亞洲國家開源 AI 的需求。

article.title: After Fable 5 ban, Anthropic and 19 organizations launch open source security body
article.summary: The arrival of frontier AI models capable of scanning major open-source projects and surfacing multiple vulnerabilities in a single pass has handed defenders an extraordinary tool — but one that attackers can access, too. Now, some of the biggest names in tech and industry are betting that the only way to stay ahead is to work together. The result is Akrites , launched on Thursday by the Linux Foundation, which serves as a coordinated body to handle vulnerability discovery, remediation, and disclosure for critical open-source software. Its founding roster spans some 20 organizations, among them AWS, Anthropic, Google, Microsoft and its GitHub subsidiary, OpenAI, Cisco, Red Hat, NVIDIA, Chainguard, Sonatype, Ericsson, Vodafone, Citi, and JPMorganChase. The initiative takes its name fr
article.title_zh: Fable 5 禁令後，Anthropic 與 19 個組織啟動開源安全機構
article.summary_zh: 能夠掃描主要開源項目並在一次掃描中發現多個漏洞的前沿 AI 模型為防守者提供了強大工具，但攻擊者也能夠使用。技術和產業的主要企業現在正押注於...

article.title: ‘Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 Pro’ needed more words to prove its power, three other flagship chips coming
article.summary: Qualcomm’s Snapdragon chipset lineup is eternally confusing, with slight variations generating new names and options that aren’t all that different. But it sounds like the next few releases are going to be especially confusing, with several new chips in the works including the “Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 Pro.”
article.title_zh: 'Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 Pro' 需要更多詞彙來證明其實力，另有三款旗艦晶片推出
article.summary_zh: Qualcomm 的 Snapdragon 晶片組陣容一直令人困惑，細微變化產生的新名稱和選項差異不大。但接下來的幾個版本似乎會特別令人困惑。

article.title: Nokia and Google Cloud are embedding Gemini AI agents into network operations software
article.summary: Six specialized Nokia agents will roll out through 2027 In sum – what we know: Google Cloud and Nokia have expanded their partnership to push Gemini-powered AI agents directly into Nokia’s network operations software, with the integration centered on the Nokia Assurance…
article.title_zh: Nokia 和 Google Cloud 將 Gemini AI 代理嵌入網路運營軟體
article.summary_zh: Google Cloud 和 Nokia 擴展合作，將 Gemini 驅動的 AI 代理直接集成到 Nokia 網路運營軟體中，並計畫於 2027 年前推出六個專門的 Nokia 代理。

article.title: US Invests $250 Million in Billionaire’s Startup for Chip Making
article.summary: I-Pulse Inc. will receive $250 million in US funding for semiconductor and pulsed-power development as the venture co-founded by Robert Friedland joins American efforts to reduce reliance on foreign-chip supply chains.
article.title_zh: 美國投資 2.5 億美元於億萬富翁初創公司用於芯片製造
article.summary_zh: I-Pulse Inc. 將獲得美國 2.5 億美元的半導體和脈衝功率開發資金，該公司由 Robert Friedland 共同創立，參與美國減少對外國芯片供應鏈依賴的努力。

article.title: Why everyone from OpenAI to SpaceX is building their own chips (and turning up the heat on Nvidia)
article.summary: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending.   OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and SpaceX in a growing list of companies building their way out of single-supplier risk. The goal is less of a […]
article.title_zh: 從 OpenAI 到 SpaceX，為什麼科技巨頭都在開發自家晶片（並對 Nvidia 施壓）
article.summary_zh: Nvidia 多年來主導 AI 晶片市場，但完全依賴的時代可能即將結束。OpenAI 分享了與 Broadcom 合作開發的自訂推論晶片 Jalapeño 計劃，加入 Google、Apple 和 SpaceX 等公司的行列。

article.title: Instagram now supports using Google Cast to watch Reels on your TV
article.summary: Rolling out now, the Instagram app has added support for watching Reels on your TV using Google Cast.
article.title_zh: Instagram 現已支援使用 Google Cast 在電視上觀看 Reels
article.summary_zh: Instagram 應用現已新增支援使用 Google Cast 在電視上觀看 Reels 的功能。

article.title: From Fortnite to robots: General Intuition raises $2.3B on bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
article.summary: General Intuition has raised $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting action data can help AI develop something closer to human intuition.
article.title_zh: 從 Fortnite 到機器人：General Intuition 以 23 億美元融資押注電子遊戲可訓練真實世界的 AI 智能體
article.summary_zh: General Intuition 籌集 3.2 億美元來擴展由數百萬小時遊戲數據訓練的 AI，押注遊戲行為數據可幫助 AI 開發出更接近人類直覺的能力。

article.title: How to Opt Out of Google Search’s New AI Data Training Feature
article.summary: Google’s Search history update stores media uploads from your interactions, like images used in reverse image searches, for training its AI models.
article.title_zh: 如何選擇退出 Google 搜尋的新 AI 數據訓練功能
article.summary_zh: Google 搜尋歷史更新會儲存來自你互動的媒體上傳，如反向圖片搜尋中使用的圖像，用於訓練其 AI 模型。

article.title: Google Wallet just got an update to track your online orders
article.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority TL;DR You’ll now be able to view and track online orders in Google Wallet. The app will automatically pull order information — like receipts, tracking numbers, and shipping status — from Gmail to do so. This feature is only available in the US and needs to be enabled in Gmail settings. One of the more useful features in Gmail is order tracking. After you make a purchase online, Gmail can help you keep an eye on the status of your delivery. Now, that capability is getting extended to the Google Wallet app. You can now view and track online orders within Google Wallet. As the tech giant explains , orders that are arriving soon will be displayed on the homescreen. When you tap on “View more” while in the app, orders that are arriving that day or are in t
article.title_zh: Google Wallet 推出訂單追蹤功能
article.summary_zh: Google Wallet 現在支援檢視和追蹤線上訂單，應用程式會自動從 Gmail 提取收據、追蹤號碼和運送狀態等資訊，目前僅在美國提供。

article.title: General Intuition’s $2.3B bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
article.summary: General Intuition has raised $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting action data can help AI develop something closer to human intuition.
article.title_zh: General Intuition 以 23 億美元賭注認為電子遊戲可以為真實世界訓練 AI 代理
article.summary_zh: General Intuition 融資 3.2 億美元以擴展使用數百萬小時遊戲玩法訓練的 AI，賭注是動作數據能幫助 AI 發展出更接近人類直覺的能力。

article.title: 產品體驗平臺公司Pendo、雲端通訊服務廠商8×8受Klue供應鏈攻擊影響，Salesforce資料外洩
article.summary: 上週爆發的Klue供應鏈攻擊事故，已有超過10家公司證實受到影響，導致他們存放在Salesforce平臺的資料出現未經授權存取的現象，其中大部分是資安公司。如今有SaaS服務公司也受害。
article.title_zh: 產品體驗平臺公司Pendo、雲端通訊服務廠商8×8受Klue供應鏈攻擊影響，Salesforce資料外洩
article.summary_zh: 上週爆發的Klue供應鏈攻擊事故，已有超過10家公司證實受到影響，導致他們存放在Salesforce平臺的資料出現未經授權存取的現象，其中大部分是資安公司。如今有SaaS服務公司也受害。
